note: Authority-anchored comprehension queries for Atropos cycle-1 (deferred-ratification lifecycle). Deterministic answers only — every expected fact terminates in the contract, the council record, or the real CURRENT-AUTHORITY data. Graded by docs/institutional-memory/comprehension-gate.mjs; per the contract's becomes_normative_when, a GRANTED artifact (negatives DENIED) is a precondition of NORMATIVE-CURRENT.

queries.query: Does Atropos ever mutate CURRENT-AUTHORITY (perform a retirement)? (boolean)
What is Atropos cycle-1's NORMATIVE verification surface? (enum)
Which retirement kinds are DEFERRED (short-circuited as inconsistent) in cycle 1? (set)
How is the supersession chain's terminal authority established? (enum)
Which plan versions are retired in the real CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded? (set)
Is the `note` field required on a #superseded entry? (boolean)

authority_anchor.data: 3 of 4 real entries carry no note

queries.query: What lifecycle did cycle-1 actually follow? (enum)
